params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

items.docs: Retrieves all automation projects within the specified organization. Each project contains automations, variables, and external service account connections.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

items.docs: Creates a new automation project within the specified organization. Projects serve as organizational containers for automations and shared configuration.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Retrieves details for a specific automation project including its metadata, creation date, and current status.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Updates the name or description of an existing automation project.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Permanently deletes an automation project and all its automations, variables, and configuration. This action is irreversible.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Retrieves all automation workflow definitions within a specific project, including their trigger configurations, steps, and activation status.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

params.name: automation_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation.

items.docs: Retrieves the full configuration of a specific automation including trigger settings, action steps, error handling, and activation status.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

params.name: automation_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation.

items.docs: Enables an automation so that it will execute when its configured trigger conditions are met. Only automations in a valid, configured state can be activated.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

params.name: automation_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation.

items.docs: Disables an active automation, preventing it from executing when its trigger conditions are met. Existing in-progress executions will complete before the automation is fully deactivated.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of execution log entries for all automations in the project, showing each run with its trigger context, status, and completion time.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

params.name: execution_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the execution log entry.

items.docs: Retrieves the full details of a specific automation execution log entry, including step-by-step results and any error messages encountered.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Retrieves all audit log entries for administrative actions taken within the project such as creating, updating, or deleting automations and configuration changes.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Retrieves all project variables defined for the automation project. Variables are reusable key-value pairs that can be referenced across automation configurations.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Creates a new project variable that can be referenced in automation configurations. Variables can store API keys, URLs, or other configuration values that are used across multiple automations.

params.name: organization_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the automation project.

items.docs: Retrieves all external service account connections configured for the automation project, such as connections to Slack, email services, or other third-party platforms.
